prompt: A single vast ocean, its surface covered almost entirely by a dense, suffocating layer of fragmented plastic debris in muted grays and sickly yellows. Beneath the surface, glimpsed through a small clearing, is pure deep blue water , barely visible, almost a memory. No text, no charts, no labels. Photorealistic, aerial view, cinematic lighting, editorial magazine style. The clear water occupies less than 10% of the frame.
dataset_name: Global Plastic Waste - Our World in Data
insight: Only 9% of all plastic ever produced has been recycled, leaving the vast majority polluting oceans and land.
